changes.text: Added Discord OAuth login and logout routes.
Added /api/me so the website can display the logged-in Discord user.
Replaced the placeholder login button with a real Discord login state in the navbar.
Reorganized the website project into modular CSS and JavaScript folders.
Added an OAuth-ready server structure for future Discord login work.
Removed legacy style.css and script.js references so the project has one clean structure.
Reduced the desktop hero height so the feature section appears sooner.
Polished the desktop homepage spacing, buttons, navbar and live stats card alignment.
Added cleaner hover styling and accent details to the feature cards.
Centered the mobile pagination controls.
Aligned changelog status badges and update text more cleanly on mobile.
Redesigned command documentation with a split-view layout on desktop and a bottom sheet on mobile.
Added shareable command hashes and copy buttons for command usage examples.
Renamed the commands navigation to Documentation to better match the new reference layout.
Replaced the browser page prompt with a custom page picker modal.
Polished mobile command rows and details so command names and descriptions stay readable.
Made command pagination responsive with Previous, Next and smart page jumping.
Improved the mobile commands table so long command names no longer overlap descriptions.
Rebuilt the mobile navigation with a hamburger menu.
Changed the commands area into a paginated table that renders 10 commands per page.
Added skeleton loading states for live stats, commands and changelog content.
Polished command details, footer styling and Discord preview metadata.
Added interactive command documentation.
Updated command cards with expandable details.
Added the public changelog section.
Updated the homepage navigation for the changelog.
Added the live commands page with search and category filtering.
Added public, admin and owner visibility badges for commands.
Connected the website to the bot API for live stats.
Added bot name, server count, user count, ping and uptime.
